basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group. Research interests include LLM Reasoning, VLM Hallucination, and LLM Truthfulness.

work.name: MINIMAX
work.summary: Research intern working on large language models.

work.name: Tencent WXG
work.summary: Research intern advised by Zifei Shan.

work.summary: Research intern advised by Prof. Yu Cheng.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

publications.summary: Synthesizing verifiable reasoning data at scale for learning logical reasoning and beyond.

publications.summary: Investigating the perception bottleneck of vision-language models for chart understanding.
